title: MemoryEntry (Hardened)
description: Hardened MemoryEntry schema for arifOS constitutional memory system. Includes H7 (TTL/lifecycle), H8 (audit fields), and H9 (composite scoring) hardening additions. Constitutional floors: F1 Amanah, F2 Haqq, F4 Nur, F12 Hifz.

id.description: Unique identifier for the memory entry (UUID v4)

area.description: Memory area classification. MAIN: primary knowledge. FRAGMENTS: partial/incomplete info. SOLUTIONS: solved problems, working implementations. INSTRUMENTS: tools, configs, operational data.

project_id.description: Project context for the memory entry

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of content for integrity verification (F1 Amanah)

f1_pseudo_embedding.description: H4: True if the stored vector is a SHA-256 pseudo-embedding (BGE-M3 was unavailable). Pseudo-embeddings are quarantined from semantic ranking.

f2_verified.description: Whether this entry passed F2 Haqq truth verification on last recall

f2_confidence.description: H5: Composite F2 truth confidence score. Formula: 0.30*age + 0.20*access + 0.30*source + 0.20*embedding_quality. Threshold: 0.55.

f4_entropy_delta.description: F4 Nur entropy delta from storage-time clarity check. Negative values indicate entropy reduction (good). Positive values flagged.

f12_clean.description: Whether content passed F12 Hifz injection scan at storage time

f12_score.description: F12 Hifz injection scan score (0 = clean, 1 = injection detected). Threshold: block if > 0.7.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the memory was first stored

last_accessed.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent recall

access_count.description: Number of times this memory has been recalled. Used in H5 F2 scoring and H9 composite ranking.

source.description: Origin source identifier. Known values: user, import, engineering_memory, vector_store, agent, knowledge_pipeline, evidence_bundle, unknown.

source_agent.description: Agent/session ID that created this memory. Nullable for user-direct stores.

ttl_days.description: H7: Time-to-live in days. null means permanent (default for backward compatibility). After TTL expires, lifecycle_state transitions to 'stale'.

lifecycle_state.description: H7: Memory lifecycle state. active: normal. stale: TTL expired or not accessed for 30+ days. archived: stale and not accessed for 60+ days. tombstone: soft-deleted, pending hard purge after 180 days.

composite_score.description: H9: Composite ranking score computed at query time. Formula: 0.45*cosine + 0.20*recency + 0.10*access + 0.15*source + 0.10*area. null if not yet scored.

score_breakdown.description: H9: Detailed breakdown of composite_score components at last query time.

recency.description: Recency score using exponential decay with 90-day half-life (weight: 0.20)

access.description: Access frequency score, saturates at 20 accesses (weight: 0.10)

area.description: Area priority score — SOLUTIONS=1.0, MAIN=0.8, INSTRUMENTS=0.7, FRAGMENTS=0.5 (weight: 0.10)

examples.content: F12 Hifz is the injection scan floor. It runs PNS·SHIELD pattern matching on all inputs and blocks any content that attempts to bypass constitutional governance.
